Story.Name: Story_Item_CondensedBlood
Story.Desc: 由万炼血鼎凝成的血晶，破开后方知其中孕有何种血液。

Story.Name: Story_炼化dBloodCrystal
Story.Desc: 由处理过的血液再度精炼而成，破开后或许能发现异物。

Story.Name: Story_ConsumeloodlineCatalyst
Story.Desc: 血脉引乃血液受灵气浸染，又在机缘巧合中久经炼化而成的灵物。饮下后或得巨大裨益，但其中阳火之气极盛，亦会反噬肉身。此物可服用两次：入内门前一次，入内门后一次。

Story.Name: Story_ConsumeBlood
Story.Desc: 饮下这一瓶蕴含灵气的血液。

li.DisplayCondition: story:GetBindThing().def.Name == "Item_YangBlood" or story:GetBindThing().def.Name == "Item_YinBlood" or story:GetBindThing().def.Name == "Item_GoldenBlood" or story:GetBindThing().def.Name == "Item_LifeBlood" or story:GetBindThing().def.Name == "Item_EarthSpiritBlood"
